message:
test(raptorq): add differential harness (D2), D4 unit logging, and stress soak (D8)

Three major additions to the RaptorQ conformance test suite:

Differential Harness (D2 — differential_harness module):
- Independent reference decoder using GaussianSolver that builds the
  full equation system from received symbols and solves via Markowitz
  pivoting.  This is intentionally different from the production
  InactivationDecoder path to catch implementation-specific bugs.
- DifferentialCase struct parameterizes k, symbol_size, seed, drop
  pattern, repair budget, and expected outcome.
- root_cause_label() classifies mismatches: source_payload_mismatch,
  intermediate_symbol_mismatch, error_kind_mismatch, or single-sided
  failures.
- Three test cases: two success scenarios with different loss patterns
  and one deliberate insufficient-symbols failure.
- Full UnitLogEntry emission with decode stats and schema validation.

D4 Unit Logging (metamorphic_property updates):
- Added emit_d4_unit_log() helper that emits structured UnitLogEntry
  JSON for decode-failure-policy scenarios.
- insufficient_symbols_returns_error now asserts specifically on
  InsufficientSymbols (not SingularMatrix) and panics on unexpected
  success, replacing the previous permissive match that silently
  accepted any error variant or even successful decodes.
- multi_seed_erasure_stress now uses 10 curated in-scope seeds instead
  of iterating 0..50 with a skip-on-failure heuristic.  Each seed must
  succeed (panic on failure with forensic context), eliminating the
  "at least 80% of seeds" threshold that masked flaky behavior.
- Both tests emit structured unit logs with artifact paths and repro
  commands.

Stress/Soak E2E (D8 — stress_soak_e2e module):
- Three stress profiles: ClusteredLoss (6-symbol sliding window),
  BurstLoss (two 4-symbol bursts), NearRankDeficient (10-symbol window
  with minimal repair headroom).
- 24 deterministic iterations per profile with periodic summary
  emission every 8 iterations.
- StressForensicReport JSON emitted at profile completion with success
  rate, avg/max gauss_ops and inactivated counts, and threshold checks.
- Corruption detection: any source symbol mismatch is a hard failure
  (zero tolerance across all profiles).
- Per-profile thresholds: clustered/burst require 100% success rate;
  near-rank-deficient allows up to 7 failures (70% minimum).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
